title: clematis terniflora var. boninensis
intro: Clematis terniflora var. boninensis, also known as the Sweet-scented Clematis or Japanese Clematis, is a flowering plant species in the Clematis genus. It is primarily used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues and fever. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which are consumed to harness its potential medicinal benefits.
